## Analyzers (2)

### [BackscatterIO_GetObservations v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO/BackscatterIO_GetObservations.json)
Determine whether a value has known scanning activity using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`

### [BackscatterIO_Enrichment v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/BackscatterIO/BackscatterIO_Enrichment.json)
Enrich values using Backscatter.io data.

- **Author:** brandon@backscatter.io
- **License:** APLv2
- **Data Types:** `ip`, `network`, `autonomous-system`, `port`
